dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry condition uses prev_high to represent 'high of the selling day tested on open of short sale day'. The signal requires detecting an uptrend and prior long position closure, which are contextual; the core technical condition is that the open of the short entry day reaches or exceeds the previous day's high. Exit uses a mean reversion approach (close crossing above sma_20) to exit the short when uptrend resumes, consistent with the 3-day cycle timing mentioned in the source text.

backtest_rule.reason: Entry condition uses prev_high to represent 'high of the selling day tested on open of short sale day'. The signal requires detecting an uptrend and prior long position closure, which are contextual; the core technical condition is that the open of the short entry day reaches or exceeds the previous day's high. Exit uses a mean reversion approach (close crossing above sma_20) to exit the short when uptrend resumes, consistent with the 3-day cycle timing mentioned in the source text.

source_rule_text: When closing a long position and entering a short during an uptrend, enter the short immediately if the high of the selling day is tested on the open of the short sale day.
